reviews.comment: DO NOT TAKE HER. She is an absolutely horrible instructor. More than anything, she lacks abilities to communicate with students properly; her lecture is always unclear. She gives "exams" that are basically quizzes. If you miss two questions (each worth a point ) and get 8 out of 10, that would be equivalent to getting 80 out of 100. TERRIBLE.

I had her for both CSC 386 and 125. She has an accent and is hard to understand. Sometimes she gives quizzes that has information we havent learned. She moves exam dates around a lot which can be confusing. She isnt very good at explaining topics very well and she thinks you are slacking if you do not understand a certain topic. not reccomended!

Ms. Veranas may seem difficult to understand at 1st due to her accent but, with VERY MINIMAL effort, you will understand her w/ no problem.  I heard lots of complaints, but if they had used 1/10 of that effort to do the work, Ms. Veranas was MORE THAN WILLING to assist..even HOURS at a time, personal time. She NEVER ONCE failed to reply to emails.

Worst prof. I have ever had.If  you email her do not expect a response. Does not clearly give expectations on Exams. Most of the coding that we learned was extremely outdated(2000-20003)                     AVOID AT ALL COSTS

  Comment: DO NOT TAKE HER. She is an absolutely horrible instructor. More than anything, she lacks abilities to communicate with students properly; her lecture is always unclear. She gives "exams" that are basically quizzes. If you miss two questions (each worth a point ) and get 8 out of 10, that would be equivalent to getting 80 out of 100. TERRIBLE.

  Comment: I had her for both CSC 386 and 125. She has an accent and is hard to understand. Sometimes she gives quizzes that has information we havent learned. She moves exam dates around a lot which can be confusing. She isnt very good at explaining topics very well and she thinks you are slacking if you do not understand a certain topic. not reccomended!

Review 4:

  Date: 2012-05-13
  Comment: Ms. Veranas may seem difficult to understand at 1st due to her accent but, with VERY MINIMAL effort, you will understand her w/ no problem.  I heard lots of complaints, but if they had used 1/10 of that effort to do the work, Ms. Veranas was MORE THAN WILLING to assist..even HOURS at a time, personal time. She NEVER ONCE failed to reply to emails.

  Comment: Worst prof. I have ever had.If  you email her do not expect a response. Does not clearly give expectations on Exams. Most of the coding that we learned was extremely outdated(2000-20003)                     AVOID AT ALL COSTS
